s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: Calamarine + Hydro Q-Sorb + 6-Nutrient Formula (Omega Q Plus): The pure, potent extract from select species of deep-water calamari squid is called Calamarine omega-3 oil and it has abundantly MORE DHA omega-3s than ordinary fish oil - in some cases as much as 85% more! While both EPA and DHA omega-3s support cardiovascular health, newest clinical research reveals that it's the DHA omega-3s that do the real heavy lifting when it comes to supporting blood pressure, circulation, blood vessel health, brain, eyes, and colon. The Calamarine used in Omega Q Plus comes from select calamari caught by local fisherman in pristine, deep ocean waters. These tiny creatures reproduce quickly and are fished at the end of their very brief lifespan, so they don't acquire the mercury, lead, and other environmental toxins that large, long-lived fish can. Then the oil extract goes through rigorous 5-stage purification process to ensure superior quality and safety. Calamarine is highly sustainable with little risk of overfishing. PLUS, this special patented form of CoQ10 called Hydro Q-Sorb is scientifically proven to be 8 times better absorbed than ordinary powdered CoQ10. That means your body has 8 times the access to this antioxidant and energizing 'ace' to keep your heart and arteries healthy, fight inflammation, fuel your body on a cellular level, boost physical and mental energy. You can look and feel younger, stronger, and just plain better!

lead.full_text: For over 25 years I was 'hooked' on fish oil. As a cardiologist and founder of the New England Heart & Longevity Center, I was a HUGE fan of fish oil. That's because fish oil helps with many areas of cardio health, plus it's great for your brain, skin, and more. But then came the worry about mercury, PCB and other toxins contaminating fish oil. Plus the wonder over which fish oils really lived up to their promise about the levels of heart healthy omega-3 fatty acids they contained. Here's the real clincher... The final straw that made ordinary fish oil 'old news' came in the form of a tiny calamari squid...

Fish oil manufacturers use cheap EPA (abundant) instead of expensive DHA (rare) to save money. Your body desperately needs DHA for heart, brain, and circulation but fish oil doesn't provide enough. Regular CoQ10 is poorly absorbed so your cells get starved even though you're taking supplements. Statin drugs deplete your CoQ10 making problem worse.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: You've been taking contaminated fish oil with wrong fatty acid ratio, plus CoQ10 in forms that can't penetrate cell membranes. Supplement industry pushes cheap EPA over expensive DHA. Large fish accumulate toxins over long lifespans. Powder CoQ10 can't cross cell barriers. You needed a cardiologist who abandoned mainstream fish oil to find pure, DHA-rich source (calamari) plus highly bioavailable CoQ10 (Hydro Q-Sorb).
